head_commit.message:
Add regression tests for positional I/O error handling

Cover the following scenarios:

- pipe_err: zero-length `pread64`/`pwrite64`/`preadv`/`pwritev` on
  pipes must return `ESPIPE`.
- access_err: `O_PATH` file descriptors must return `EBADF` for all
  positional I/O variants (zero-length and nonzero-length).
- proc_nsfs: zero-length `pread` on namespace files must return
  `EINVAL` (not `ESPIPE`); `O_PATH` nsfs fds return `EBADF`.
- full: positional writes to `/dev/full` must return `ENOSPC`.

Signed-off-by: Zhenchen Wang <m202372036@hust.edu.cn>
Signed-off-by: Zhihang Shao <dio_ro@outlook.com>

- pipe_err: zero-length `pread64`/`pwrite64`/`preadv`/`pwritev` on
